name: Knowledge Base Tools
description: Functions for querying a bot's knowledge base, FAQs, and documentation. Use these when users ask questions that should be answered from stored content.
example_prompts: How do I set up the logging feature?
Find answers about the verification process

functions.name: search_faq
functions.description: Search the server's FAQ database for answers to common questions. Returns matching Q&A pairs ordered by relevance.

query.description: The user's question or search terms

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

functions.name: get_server_rules
functions.description: Retrieve the complete list of server rules. Call this when a user asks about rules, is warned, or needs to be reminded of the rules.

functions.name: lookup_command_docs
functions.description: Look up documentation for a specific bot command including syntax, parameters, and examples.

command_name.description: The command name to look up (without prefix, e.g. 'warn', 'mute')

functions.name: create_support_ticket
functions.description: Create a support ticket in a private channel for issues that require human moderator attention.

user_id.description: Discord user ID of the person needing support
